# Acachete Labs

> Acachete Labs is a research-grade software laboratory founded by Sebastián Salazar. We build protocol utilities, real-world asset infrastructure, and AI systems on the Stellar blockchain and beyond.

## About

Acachete Labs is an independent software laboratory focused on building high-quality, production-grade infrastructure for the Stellar ecosystem and the broader web3/AI space. The lab operates at the intersection of protocol engineering, decentralized finance, real-world asset tokenization, and artificial intelligence.

**Founder:** Sebastián Salazar (GitHub: salazarsebas)
**Website:** https://acachete.xyz
**Domain focus:** Stellar blockchain, Soroban smart contracts, DeFi, RWA, AI systems

## Projects

### Faucet
- **Status:** Active
- **Category:** Protocol Utility
- **Description:** Deterministic testnet funding utility for Stellar developers. Provides reliable, reproducible access to testnet XLM for development and testing workflows.
- **Live:** https://faucet-stellar.acachete.xyz/
- **Repo:** https://github.com/salazarsebas/acachete-faucet
- **Stack:** Stellar SDK, TypeScript, Next.js

### Stellar Explorer
- **Status:** Active
- **Category:** Protocol Utility
- **Description:** Block-level inspection tool for Stellar network analysis. Enables deep inspection of transactions, accounts, and operations on the Stellar network.
- **Live:** https://stellar-explorer.acachete.xyz/en
- **Repo:** https://github.com/salazarsebas/stellar-explorer
- **Stack:** Stellar Horizon API, React, TypeScript

### Akkuea
- **Status:** In Progress
- **Category:** Flagship / Real-World Asset Infrastructure
- **Description:** Real-world asset infrastructure built on Stellar. A platform for tokenizing and managing real-world assets using Soroban smart contracts and DeFi primitives.
- **Repo:** https://github.com/akkuea/akkuea
- **Stack:** Stellar, Soroban, DeFi, RWA

### PromptOS
- **Status:** Experimental
- **Category:** AI Infrastructure
- **Description:** AI infrastructure efficiency stack described as "the Datadog of AI". An observability and efficiency layer for AI systems and LLM pipelines.
- **Repo:** https://github.com/salazarsebas/PromptOS
- **Stack:** AI/ML, Observability, TypeScript

## What is Acachete Labs?

Acachete Labs answers the question: who builds the plumbing that makes Stellar useful? The lab fills gaps in developer tooling, infrastructure, and protocol-level utilities that the ecosystem needs but rarely prioritizes. Each project is designed to be durable, composable, and production-grade.

## Contact

GitHub: https://github.com/salazarsebas
Website: https://acachete.xyz
